name: gupy-autoapply-extension
description: Chrome extension for automating Gupy job applications

scripts.test:queue: tsc --rootDir src --target ES2020 --module ES2020 --moduleResolution node --lib ES2020,DOM --skipLibCheck --outDir /tmp/merlin-extension-tests src/background/queue-diagnostics.ts && node test/queue-diagnostics.test.mjs
scripts.test:catho: tsc --rootDir src --target ES2020 --module ES2020 --moduleResolution node --lib ES2020,DOM --skipLibCheck --outDir /tmp/merlin-extension-tests src/content/adapters/catho-utils.ts && node test/catho-utils.test.mjs
